main.warn: Please note: this letter was generated automatically and there’s no need to reply

title: Automated anti-fraud protection
subtitle: IQ Option Affiliate program is happy to introduce the new affiliate cooperation program – IQ option CPA.
subtitle-2: We have finally released a sophisticated service of user verification.

sec-2.title: CPA is easy to use
sec-2.item-1: As you already know, our FTD payout can be 13 times more than the minimum deposit required to get the CPA payout: you can get up to $130 for a user depositing from the following regulated countries DE, LU, SE, GB, NO or from these non-regulated countries HK, SA, SG, CH.
sec-2.item-2: In order to prevent user fraud, we have developed our own antifraud system. As a financial services provider we are obliged to record every step a user is registering on our platform.
sec-2.item-3: Based on the results of an analysis of 15 million users and their behavior, we have developed a scoring system that helps us to understand whether the user has been incentivized or not.
sec-2.item-4: We pay promptly and quickly. Large selection of payment systems. Payouts can be done on demand.

sec-3.title: The scoring system is a simple achievements list
sec-3.text-1: Thus, when a user is using our platform: trading, depositing, watching videos, train, chatting, adjusting, account verification and further more — we get signals about each step that is made.
sec-3.text-2: These actions are compiled in activity groups that have generate value points. When the user earns enough value points it is being approved by our micro service with right to full payout.
sec-3.text-3: If the user is not active enough (i.e. made a minimum deposit, only 3 trades and no other activity) we approve the payout, but with incentive rate.

sec-5.title: CPA is made for you if you are looking for:
sec-5.item-1: Our managers are professional media buyers with many years experience.They wil be happy to share their secrets with you.
sec-5.item-2: We inform you about all events on the platform, user registration, app installation, first deposit and more.
sec-5.item-3: With IQOption CPA you can concentrate only on your ROI goals.
sec-5.item-4: Specialy designed to meet expectations of most experienced afiliates.
